page_metadata.biotools__summary: Simple statistical identification of contaminating sequence features in marker-gene or metagenomics data. Works on any kind of feature derived from environmental sequencing data. Requires DNA quantitation data or sequenced negative control samples.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Simple statistical identification of contaminating sequence features in marker-gene or metagenomics data. Works on any kind of feature derived from environmental sequencing data. Requires DNA quantitation data or sequenced negative control samples.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Removes decontamination features (ASVs/OTUs) using control samples
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: Simple statistical identification of contaminating sequence features in marker-gene or metagenomics data. Works on any kind of feature derived from environmental sequencing data. Requires DNA quantitation data or sequenced negative control samples.
